metadata.description: shuck plugins: the background CI/review monitor and failing-CI-log inspection tools

plugins.name: shuck
plugins.description: A background monitor that keeps Claude current on your PR: new CI failures with their exact failing step logs, review comments with code context, and stale GitHub Action pins — delivered into the session as they happen. Plus the on-demand shuck tools (logs, reviews, security, compliance, Dependabot, pins, SHA-pinning) as a skill and an MCP server.
